_meta.note: Fire & Blood reconciler output for fab-the-lysene-spring-24-p01 (smoke=False).

edges.quote: raise up Toron’s halfbrother Rodrik
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Rodrik Greyjoy SIBLING_OF Toron Greyjoy

edges.quote: his halfbrother Rodrik was taken and brought back to Casterly Rock
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Johanna Lannister CAPTURES Rodrik Greyjoy

edges.quote: Lady Johanna had him gelded and made him her son's fool
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Johanna Lannister TORTURES Rodrik Greyjoy

edges.quote: came forward now to press his father’s claim
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Eldric Arryn CLAIMS Eyrie

edges.quote: A third claimant emerged in the person of one Isembard Arryn
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Isembard Arryn CLAIMS Eyrie

edges.quote: bribing lesser lords to support his claim
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Isembard Arryn MANIPULATES Vale of Arryn

edges.quote: the “velvet tyranny” of Lysandro Rogare, who had taken on himself the style of First Magister for Life
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lysandro Rogare RULES Lys

edges.quote: Lord Cregan Stark of Winterfell borrowed a huge sum from the Iron Bank of Braavos
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Cregan Stark RULES Winterfell

edges.quote: the last known sighting of Sheepstealer and his rider, Nettles
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Nettles BONDED_TO Sheepstealer

edges.quote: The Faceless Men of Braavos were widely believed to have been responsible for the killings
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Faceless Men KILLS Lysandro Rogare

edges.quote: The Faceless Men of Braavos were widely believed to have been responsible for the killings
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Faceless Men KILLS Drazenko Rogare

edges.quote: Lysaro Rogare aspired to rule Lys
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lysaro Rogare CLAIMS Lys

edges.quote: winning the commons with lavish entertainments and the magisters with bribes
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lysaro Rogare MANIPULATES Lys

edges.quote: The rest of the Red Keep was in the hands of Ser Marston Waters and his Kingsguard
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Marston Waters COMMANDS Kingsguard

edges.quote: Ser Lucas Leygood and his gold cloaks kept a firm grip on King’s Landing
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lucas Leygood COMMANDS City Watch of King's Landing

edges.quote: Costayne died amidst the stony hills of Great Wyk
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Arthur Goodbrother AGENT_IN Death of Ser Leo Costayne

edges.quote: Costayne died amidst the stony hills of Great Wyk
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Leo Costayne VICTIM_IN Death of Ser Leo Costayne

edges.quote: landing thousands of Lannister swords and spears
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Leo Costayne AGENT_IN Lannister reprisal on the Iron Islands

edges.quote: had him gelded and made him her son's fool
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Rodrik Greyjoy PARTICIPATES_IN Rodrik Greyjoy gelded

edges.quote: Lady Jeyne Arryn, the Maiden of the Vale, died at Gulltown
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Jeyne Arryn VICTIM_IN Death of Lady Jeyne Arryn

edges.quote: Larra of Lys gave birth to a son
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Larra Rogare AGENT_IN Birth of Prince Aegon (son of Viserys)

edges.quote: his young wife, the Lady Floris, died in childbirth
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Floris Baratheon VICTIM_IN Death of Lady Floris

edges.quote: a crossbowman on Runestone's battlements loosed a quarrel
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Corwyn Corbray VICTIM_IN Death of Ser Corwyn Corbray

edges.quote: crushed by a falling boulder when the clansmen toppled half a mountainside
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Robert Rowan VICTIM_IN Death of Ser Robert Rowan

edges.quote: That was the last known sighting of Sheepstealer and his rider, Nettles
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Sheepstealer AGENT_IN Last sighting of Sheepstealer and Nettles

edges.quote: the city magisters moved at once to seize the Rogare Bank
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Lysaro Rogare AGENT_IN Fall of House Rogare / Rogare Bank collapse

edges.quote: Lord Rowan himself joined the Rogares in captivity
edges.note: Fire & Blood event: Marston Waters AGENT_IN Removal of Lord Rowan and coup at court
